Title: Verify form submission with valid input
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Enter valid first name, last name, email, and age. 3. Select a country and skills. 4. Tick the checkboxes. 5. Upload a valid image. 6. Click Submit.
Test Data: FirstName=Ravi; LastName=Magar; Email=ravi@example.com; Age=34; Country=India; Skills=Java,Selenium
Expected Result: The form is submitted successfully and the result shows Submitted.

Title: Verify dropdown and multi-select behavior
Preconditions: The demo app is loaded with the form visible.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Select a country from the dropdown. 3. Choose multiple skills from the multi-select list. 4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: The selected country and all chosen skills are reflected in the submission result.

Title: Verify checkboxes stay unchecked until submission
Preconditions: The app is open and the form is displayed.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Select one checkbox only. 3. Observe the result message without clicking Submit.
Expected Result: The result text remains Ready until Submit is clicked.

Title: Verify file upload field accepts a valid image
Preconditions: A sample image file is available in the test resources folder.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Select a valid image file using the upload control. 3. Observe the page state.
Expected Result: The file is attached successfully and no upload error is shown.

Title: Verify status button changes page output
Preconditions: The app is open and interactive controls are visible.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Click the Status button. 3. Observe the result message.
Expected Result: The result message updates to show the status action.

Title: Verify form validation for empty mandatory fields
Test Steps: 1. Leave required fields empty. 2. Click Submit. 3. Check the validation behavior.
Expected Result: The user is prompted to complete the required fields before submission.

Title: Verify multi-select retains multiple skill selections
Preconditions: The form is loaded with the skills dropdown available.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Select several skills from the multi-select control. 3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: All selected skills remain visible in the form result.

Title: Verify dropdown options are available
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Expand the country dropdown. 3. Review the listed values.
Expected Result: The dropdown contains the expected options for selection.

Title: Verify file download flow
Preconditions: The download feature is enabled on the page.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Click the download control if present. 3. Verify the file is downloaded.
Expected Result: The file is downloaded successfully to the expected location.

Title: Verify submit button visibility and handling
Preconditions: The form is loaded in the browser.
Test Steps: 1. Open the app. 2. Locate the Submit button. 3. Confirm it is visible and clickable.
Expected Result: The Submit button is visible and responds to user action.
